extName.description: Extension name shown in the Chrome Web Store and chrome://extensions.

extDescription.message: Export claude.ai chats to VS Code with one click. Needs the Exportal extension in VS Code (pair with its token).
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in store listings.

actionTooltipUnpaired.message: Exportal Companion — click to pair with VS Code
actionTooltipUnpaired.description: Tooltip on the toolbar icon when the extension hasn't been paired yet.

actionTooltipPaired.description: Tooltip on the toolbar icon after successful pairing.

optionsPageTitle.description: Browser tab title for the options page.

optionsSubtitle.message: Pair this extension with the one in VS Code to export claude.ai chats with one click.
optionsSubtitle.description: Short explanation under the options page heading.

bannerNotPaired.description: Short status chip shown in the header when no token is saved. Still referenced from background.js for the toolbar tooltip — options page uses chipWaiting/chipDetected/chipPaired instead.

bannerPaired.description: Short status chip shown in the header after a valid token is saved. Still referenced from background.js for the toolbar tooltip — options page uses chipPaired instead.

chipWaiting.description: Options page header chip — shown when no token is saved and the input is empty.

chipDetected.description: Options page header chip — shown when the input contains a valid 64-hex token but the user hasn't clicked Pair yet.

chipPaired.description: Options page header chip — shown after the token has been saved to chrome.storage.local.

headlineWaiting.message: Paste the token from VS Code
headlineWaiting.description: Options page headline in waiting state.

headlineDetected.description: Options page headline in detected state.

headlinePaired.description: Options page headline in paired state.

subtitleWaiting.message: Copy it from the command palette: Exportal: Show bridge pairing token.
subtitleWaiting.description: Subtitle under the headline in waiting state.

subtitleDetected.message: You pasted it from VS Code. Confirm and you are done.
subtitleDetected.description: Subtitle under the headline in detected state.

subtitlePaired.message: You can now export any claude.ai chat to VS Code with a single click.
subtitlePaired.description: Subtitle under the headline in paired state.

btnPair.description: Primary button label in waiting and detected states.

btnAllConnected.description: Primary button label in paired state — informational, not clickable.

unpairButton.description: Low-contrast text button shown only in paired state to clear the stored token.

howToGetToken.message: How do I get the token?

stepInstall.message: Install the Exportal extension in VS Code (search for "Exportal" in the Marketplace or install the .vsix).
stepInstall.description: Pairing step 1 — contains markup rendered via innerHTML.

stepOpenPalette.message: In VS Code open the command palette (Ctrl + Shift + P) and run Exportal: Show bridge pairing token.
stepOpenPalette.description: Pairing step 2 — contains markup rendered via innerHTML.

stepCopyToken.message: Click Copy token. Come back here and paste it into the field below.
stepCopyToken.description: Pairing step 3 — contains markup rendered via innerHTML.

tokenLabel.description: Label for the token input field.

tokenPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text inside the token input.

tokenHint.message: Must match exactly the one shown by VS Code. 64 characters in 0-9 and a-f.
tokenHint.description: Hint below the token input — contains markup.

tokenSaved.description: Status message after the token is persisted.

tokenCleared.description: Status message after the token is removed.

tokenInvalid.description: Error shown when pasted token fails the regex check.

localFirstLead.description: Lead strong-text of the reassurance block at the bottom of the options page.

localFirstBody.message: The bridge runs on 127.0.0.1. Nothing leaves your machine.
localFirstBody.description: Body of the reassurance block — contains a <code> span rendered via innerHTML.

fabAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the floating action button on claude.ai.

fabTooltip.message: Exportal (Alt+Shift+E export now, Alt+Shift+O official export)
fabTooltip.description: Tooltip on the floating action button.

btnSendNow.description: Primary button inside the floating popover.

btnPrepareOfficial.description: Secondary button — stores the conversation UUID for matching the eventual Takeout ZIP.

feedbackOfficialPrepared.message: Done — now trigger the official export
feedbackOfficialPrepared.description: Confirmation after the secondary action succeeds.

feedbackError.description: Generic error shown on the button after a failed action.

feedbackSearching.description: Button text while fetching the conversation from claude.ai.

feedbackSending.description: Button text while POSTing to the local bridge.

feedbackOpenedInVsCode.description: Confirmation after a successful inline export.

toastExporting.description: Toast shown when the export was triggered via keyboard shortcut.

toastPairedWithVsCode.description: Toast shown on claude.ai after the auto-pair URL fragment is consumed successfully.

pulseHeadline.description: Headline in the success pulse overlay shown after a successful inline export.

pulseMessagesSuffix.description: Noun following the message count in the success pulse. English uses no pluralization for the mono-style metric line.

errSessionExpired.message: Session expired — sign in to claude.ai

errTimeout.message: Timeout — claude.ai is slow to respond
